title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the project's README file to include an 'Author' section with the relevant author information.
details: Open the README.md file in the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section at the end (or in an appropriate location) of the file. Include the author's name and, if available, contact information or a link to their profile (e.g., GitHub, email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file to confirm the 'Author' section appears correctly, is free of typos, and matches the project's formatting style. Optionally, preview the file in a Markdown viewer to verify correct rendering.
